items.title: Enhance API Translations with Dynamic Descriptions in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces translatable API field descriptions in the OpenAPI specification, allowing for dynamic localization. By integrating the existing translation pipeline, descriptions are now referenced via `$t()` keys, streamlining the process for multiple languages. The initial implementation focuses on the glm-chat-completions service, ensuring accurate translations are served based on user locale.

items.title: Optimize Checker for Efficiency in Platform Service 🤖
items.summary: This update reduces the Checker CronJob's probe interval from every 2 minutes to every 10 minutes, significantly lowering the number of probes. Additionally, the prompt for checking liveness has been simplified to a one-word response, drastically cutting token usage and costs associated with upstream services. These changes enhance performance while maintaining acceptable detection lag.

items.title: Improve BYOC Credential Error Handling in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the error handling for BYOC credentials by implementing a new function, `formatErrorDetail()`, which flattens nested error objects into a readable string. Previously, errors were not displayed, leading to confusion for users. Now, both extension and form submission errors will be clearly communicated, improving user experience.

items.title: Enhance cookie handling in Backend 🍪
items.summary: This update modifies the `ConnectorCredentialsSerializer` to accept list values for cookies in the BYOC credential payload. By changing the `payload` field to a `DictField`, both list-shaped and string-shaped payloads are now supported, ensuring proper validation and functionality for cookie-based connectors. This fix resolves the 400 error encountered during connection attempts.

items.title: Automatic i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated internationalization (i18n) translation updates based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications were made across multiple language files, enhancing the application's accessibility for users in various regions. The changes include new confirmation messages and error handling prompts in several languages.

items.title: Enhance Deployment Deletion with Force Option in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a force delete option for deployment-type applications when normal deletion fails. Users will now see a confirmation prompt asking if they want to force delete the application record, ensuring that stuck records can be removed. Key changes include modifications to the application operator and UI components to handle this new functionality.

items.title: Enhance deployment teardown with force option in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a `?force=true` parameter to the deployment teardown API, allowing the deletion of application records even when the underlying cloud resource fails to tear down. This feature provides operators with a solution for handling orphaned applications with corrupted metadata or unreachable resources. The change ensures that applications can be removed without leaving undeletable records in the system.

items.title: Revamped Landing Page with Enhanced Features in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces significant improvements to the landing page, including a new installation step guide for SDKs, enhanced code blocks using a unified `CodeSnippet` component, and visually appealing API category cards with icons. Additionally, the tab night mode has been fixed for better visibility, and all code snippets have been verified for accuracy against existing packages. The overall user experience is now more engaging and informative.

items.title: Boosted AI Models Count on Homepage in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The homepage of UnifiedHub has been updated to reflect an increase in AI models from 200+ to 300+. This change involved modifications to the UnifiedHub component and localization files for both English and Chinese. The update ensures that users have the most accurate information regarding the current catalog size.

items.title: Add gear icon for Manage Keys button in Frontend Web ⚙️
items.summary: This update registers the `faGear` icon for the **管理密钥** (Manage Keys) button on the `/console/applications` page. Previously, this button rendered without an icon, while other buttons displayed theirs. The fix involved importing and adding the `faGear` icon to the central Font Awesome plugin, ensuring consistent iconography across the interface.

items.title: Enlarge Application ID Font Size for Better Readability in Frontend Web ✨
items.summary: This update increases the font size of the application ID displayed on the global balance card in the console from 11px to 13px. The change ensures consistency with surrounding text, enhancing overall readability for users. The modification was made in the ApiKeyQuickAccess component.

items.title: Removed cookie keep-alive feature in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The cookie keep-alive feature has been removed due to build issues with the Playwright image. This change eliminates several components including the Dockerfile, cronjob, and associated services, while ensuring that cookie connectors remain functional. The update streamlines the deployment process and maintains existing cookie READ functionality.

items.title: Enhance session settings restoration and editability in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update restores session settings such as model, working directory, reasoning effort, and edit mode when reloading a Coding Bridge conversation. Users can now edit these settings on every turn, ensuring a more flexible and consistent experience. The changes are complemented by server-side updates to persist these settings effectively.

items.title: Enhance Session Management in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new session metadata management system that persists and restores per-session settings, including working directory, permission mode, and reasoning effort. Key files modified include `session_meta.py`, which now saves session data to a JSON file, and updates to `session.py` and `connection.py` to integrate this functionality. Overall, this enhancement improves the user experience by ensuring that sessions can resume with the correct context after a reload.

items.title: Enhance cookie image for seamless playwright installs in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the Dockerfile for the cookie keep-alive image to ensure that the apt lists are retained during the playwright installation process. By moving the cleanup step after the installation, it prevents errors related to missing package lists, thereby enhancing the build process without impacting app deployment. This change is part of ongoing improvements to the deployment workflow.

items.title: Update connector icons for global accessibility in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update re-hosts all connector icons on the CDN to ensure they load properly across different regions. Previously, some icons were blocked or failed to render due to cross-origin restrictions. Now, all 11 icons are accessible regardless of the user's location, enhancing the user experience.

items.title: Enhance AskUserQuestion Feedback in Coding Bridge Agent 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the handling of user responses in the AskUserQuestion feature. It ensures that structured answers are correctly passed through the system, allowing the CLI to acknowledge user input instead of indicating that no response was given. New tests have been added to verify this functionality, enhancing overall reliability.

items.title: Enhance Cookie-Capture Extension with Auth Match in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `auth.acedata.cloud` content-script match for the cookie-capture extension, allowing it to inject on the connectors page. The version is bumped to v0.3, and TypeScript build issues have been resolved, ensuring a clean repackage. The installation documentation has also been updated to reflect these changes.

items.title: Update acedataext Install Docs for v0.3 Package in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The installation documentation for the acedataext browser extension has been updated to point to the new v0.3 package. This change affects all 18 locales, ensuring users download the correct file that includes the necessary content-script match for auth.acedata.cloud. The live documentation will reflect this update after the merge.

items.title: Fix AskUserQuestion Answer Handling in Coding Bridge Agent 🤖
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where answers to AskUserQuestion prompts were not being processed correctly, leading to misleading messages. Key changes include plumbing the answer through the system and updating the PermissionBroker to handle answers appropriately. New tests have been added to ensure functionality and verify that the CLI now correctly echoes user responses.
